summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 35 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 94 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 56 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 19 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 4 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 39 days past due with 35 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 27 days past due with 18 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $44,175 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 3 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $25,531 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 4 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed.

125 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **74 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 64 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$34,186 in payments going out this week** across 27 tasks — make sure funds are available. $56,431 expected in from 3 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Stephanie and Marc Felton and Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 9. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 7 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 11 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 4 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 3 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 5. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 35 overdue (oldest: 39d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 28 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 4 payment tasks need Operations attention.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 12. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 20 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 18 overdue (oldest: 27d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 7 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
